title: URGENT: Factory Manager (food mfg/production)
description:
What you'll be doing

  • Manage and coordinate all production activities, including planning, scheduling, and monitoring to meet production targets and deadlines

  • Oversee quality control measures to maintain product quality and compliance with industry standards

  • Optimize manufacturing processes and identify opportunities for improvement to enhance efficiency and productivity

  • Manage and develop a team of production staff, including supervisors and operators, providing training and guidance as needed

  • Collaborate with other departments, such as procurement and logistics, to ensure a smooth and integrated supply chain

  • Implement and maintain safety protocols to ensure a safe working environment for all employees

  • Analyze production data and provide reports to upper management on key performance indicators and operational metrics


What we're looking for

  • Diploma / Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Operations Management, or a related field

  • Minimum 4 years' experience in a factory or production management role, preferably in the food manufacturing industry

  • Strong understanding of production planning, scheduling, and quality control processes

  • Excellent problem-solving and decision-making skills, with the ability to identify and resolve issues quickly

  • Demonstrated leadership skills and the ability to motivate and manage a team of production staff

  • Proficient in using production management software and data analysis tools

  • Thorough knowledge of relevant industry regulations and safety standards


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref68@trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg 

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
